channel.title: MLEbotics Blog
channel.description: AI agents, automation systems, and robotics tools — articles and updates from MLEbotics.

item.title: Building RunCompanion: AI Training at Your Wrist
item.description: How we built an AI-powered running coach that adapts to your fitness, syncs with BLE hardware, and runs on Windows, Android, iOS, and Web.
item.author: eddie@mlebotics.com (Eddie Chongtham)

item.title: AI Automation Workflow: From Idea to Production
item.description: A practical guide to building production-ready AI automation workflows using Python, OpenAI, and Firebase — lessons from shipping AutoFormFiller and Hey Girl.
item.author: eddie@mlebotics.com (Eddie Chongtham)
